title: Verilator Internal Fault When Compiling CVA6 RISC-V CPU

features.name: parameterized type declaration with dimension
features.description: Code should include a module with parameter type declaration where the type uses a width parameter in its dimension

features.name: complex parameter expression with clog2 and ternary
features.description: Code should include a parameter calculation using $clog2 function combined with a ternary operator for conditional evaluation
features.snippet:
parameter int unsigned DEPTH = 8;
parameter int unsigned ADDR_DEPTH = (DEPTH > 1) ? $clog2(DEPTH) : 1;

features.name: parameterized type in port declaration
features.description: Code should include a module port declaration using a parameterized type as the port type
